response_text:
ENTITY Airport
PK airport_code
ATTR airport_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airport_name : varchar
ATTR location_code : varchar
ATTR city_code : varchar : FK

ENTITY City
PK city_code
ATTR city_code : varchar : PK
ATTR city_name : varchar

ENTITY Airline
PK airline_code
ATTR airline_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_name : varchar

ENTITY Airplane
PK registration_code
ATTR registration_code : varchar : PK
ATTR model_code : varchar
ATTR model_name : varchar

ENTITY Flight
PK flight_code
ATTR flight_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_code : varchar : FK
ATTR origin_airport_code : varchar : FK
ATTR destination_airport_code : varchar : FK
ATTR scheduled_date : date
ATTR scheduled_time : time
ATTR airplane_registration_code : varchar : FK
ATTR status : varchar

ENTITY CrewMember
PK crew_code
ATTR crew_code : varchar : PK
ATTR crew_name : varchar
ATTR crew_surname : varchar
ATTR crew_role : varchar

ENTITY FlightStatus
PK flight_code
PK status_date
PK status_time
ATTR flight_code : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR status_date : date : PK
ATTR status_time : time : PK
ATTR status : varchar

ENTITY CrewAssignment
PK flight_code
PK crew_code
ATTR flight_code : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR crew_code : varchar : PK : FK

REL Airport -> City : 0..N -> 1 : FK=city_code
REL Flight -> Airline : 1 -> 1 : FK=airline_code
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=origin_airport_code
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=destination_airport_code
REL Flight -> Airplane : 1 -> 1 : FK=airplane_registration_code
REL Flight -> FlightStatus : 1 -> 1..N : FK=flight_code
REL Flight -> CrewAssignment : 1 -> 1..N : FK=flight_code
REL CrewAssignment -> CrewMember : N -> 1 : FK=crew_code
